name: Firmware version supports validation plan
triage: Update firmware before full regression.

name: PCIe link trains to x4
triage: Check lane config and retimer logs.

name: NVMe controller ready bit is set
triage: Collect controller initialization trace.

name: Read latency p99 below target
triage: Inspect queue depth and firmware throttling.

name: Write latency p99 below target
triage: Review NAND program latency and write cache behavior.

name: Peak thermal inside envelope
triage: Check fan curve and workload duty cycle.

name: Error log page available
triage: Enable diagnostic feature flag and rerun smoke test.
